summary: Completed testing of localization features: 5-language support, USD/GHS currency switching, dual pricing in vendor dashboard, and localStorage persistence. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed products for dual pricing tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Localization features fully tested. Key localStorage keys: bst_language, bst_currency, bst_currency_manual. Exchange rate: 1 USD = 15.38 GHS. Test vendor account is in pending_onboarding status - use admin account for vendor API testing.

language_selector.details: All 5 languages (EN, FR, ES, PT, NL) with country flags working. Navigation, buttons, and labels translate correctly.

currency_selector.details: USD and GHS options available. Switching to GHS displays prices in Ghana Cedi (GH₵).

price_conversion.details: Prices convert correctly using 15.38 exchange rate. Example: $99.99 → GH₵1537.85

announcement_bar.details: Shows free shipping threshold in selected currency. $100.00 → GH₵1538.00

product_cards.details: Product cards display prices in selected currency

product_detail_page.details: Product price and customization price display in selected currency

customization_price.details: Customization price (+$15.00) converts to +GH₵230.70 when GHS selected

localStorage_persistence.details: Language and currency preferences persist in localStorage (bst_language, bst_currency, bst_currency_manual)

vendor_dual_pricing_form.details: Vendor product form has Price USD and Price GHS fields with helper text

backend_ghs_fields.details: Backend accepts price_ghs and customization_price_ghs fields in ProductCreate and ProductUpdate models
